name: Celeste Maloy
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $165,181 for Celeste Maloy in U.S. House, UT-02. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.
